governing_law.value: Laws of the State of New York
governing_law.exact_text: This Agreement shall be governed by, and construed in accordance with, the Laws of the State of New York, applicable to contracts executed in and to be performed entirely within that state.

fields.notice_period: six months prior to the expiration of the then-current term
fields.liability_cap: the amount that such party has earned pursuant to the revenue sharing provisions of Section 5.4 [Share of Net Revenue] in the twelve month period preceding the claim
